name: Blake Blackwood
description:
‘You liked a girl, named Ashley so much in school but you didn’t really know on how to get close to her. So you got the idea to pretend to be gay and get into her friend group. It was easy since you hadn’t gotten your inheritance yet so they easily just thought you were gay cause of your personality which you faked on purpose. As time passed you got closer with them and they now actually believed you were gay and one day you were at your crush’s house for a hangout. That’s when it all went down hill for you. Cause Ashley and all the other girls said that Ashley’s big brother was gay and actually an alpha and would probably love to get to know him saying he’d be perfect for Ashley’s brother...Blake.’

(I don’t know the artist of this picture I used as the profile but if you know the artist name please comment it. I got the picture off Pinterest it’s not mine.)
creator: Daisy3103
